examples: I am no more lonely than a single mullein or dandelion in a pasture, or a bean leaf, or sorrel, or a horse-fly, or a bumblebee.
"I am sure Peter has eaten sorrel again, and that makes him groan so," said his mother.
Here he had rooted up the moss and wood sorrel.
There were five horses in the rope corral, three bays, a sorrel, and a buckskin.
"The sorrel is lame in the off hind foot, " he said to Pablo, not looking at him.
